headline: AbbVie updated its Q1 and full-year 2026 earnings guidance to include a $744 million pre-tax expense for acquired IPR&D and milestones.
investor_impact: While the $0.41 EPS reduction is a notable headline, it stems from acquired IPR&D and milestone expenses which are standard for AbbVie's business development activities and typically excluded from initial forecasts. Investors will likely look past this accounting adjustment, though near-term consensus models must be recalibrated to the new $13.96-$14.16 FY26 EPS range.
key_figures: $744 million pre-tax acquired IPR&D and milestones expense
$0.41 unfavorable impact to GAAP and adjusted non-GAAP diluted EPS
$13.96 - $14.16 updated full-year 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance
$2.56 - $2.60 updated first quarter 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance
